mapper.insert: insert into recent_access (user_id, disk_item_id, action) values (#{userId}, #{diskItemId}, #{action}) on duplicate key update access_time = now(), action = #{action}
mapper.select: select d.* from recent_access r join disk_item d on d.id = r.disk_item_id where r.user_id = #{userId} and d.is_deleted = 0 order by r.access_time desc limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}
